assumptions: The developer has a local web project folder or can produce one.
No Netlify account, team project, or netlify.app site exists yet unless an anonymous drop path is selected.
The developer has a supported browser.

developer_goal: Publish a web project on Netlify and open its live preview URL.

first_success.outcome: Netlify has published the project at a unique Preview URL ending in netlify.app.
first_success.observable_signal: The project dashboard shows the Preview URL and opening it displays the published site.

route_selection.rule: Official Choose your path presents multiple peer entrants without ranking one universal first route.

candidates.name: Logged-in drag and drop / Netlify Drop
candidates.reason: Documented file-based path to a Preview URL, but signup and team selection fields are not atomically public.

candidates.name: Import existing Git repository
candidates.reason: Peer official path with Git provider authorization and build settings.

candidates.name: AI agent / template / CLI / anonymous deploy
candidates.reason: Additional peer entrants that change credentials, plan, and terminal conditions.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Netlify account and reach the intended team dashboard when the selected route requires authentication.

required_fields.label: Netlify signup or login fields
required_fields.notes: Quickstarts say sign up or log in but do not enumerate current fields, verification, or team creation.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open Add new project or the Drop publisher for a team.

required_path.action: Complete the selected publish flow (drag-and-drop folder, Git import, or alternate documented entrant).
required_path.observable_result: Netlify accepts the project and starts publish or build.

required_path.action: Open the Preview URL or production URL shown after publish.
required_path.observable_result: The browser displays the published web project.

prerequisites.description: A local project folder or remote Git repository depending on the selected entrant.
Credit-based plan features may be required for some AI entrants.

external_gates.description: Git provider authorization is required for repository import routes.
Account signup and team membership gate authenticated Drop and dashboard routes.

unavoidable_waits.description: Netlify may need to detect a framework, run a build, and publish before the Preview URL is ready.

platform_outcomes.description: Netlify publishes the project and assigns a netlify.app Preview URL.

excluded.item: Reading Choose your path and documentation home
excluded.reason: Docs are evidence for unresolved route selection.
Peer surface; not established as the universal shortest authenticated web path.

sources.title: Choose your path
evidence_supported: Peer AI, template, framework, Git, and files routes

uncertainties.question: Which of AI agent, Git repository, framework starter, template, drag and drop, or CLI is Netlify's single canonical first route?
uncertainties.impact: Required actions, fields, external gates, and plan prerequisites change materially by entrant.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human judgment selecting one bounded goal and verifying that route end-to-end against current docs and UI.

uncertainties.question: What is the current atomic Netlify account signup and team-creation sequence?
uncertainties.impact: Authenticated routes cannot expose verified account-segment counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account signup walkthrough with dated screenshots of required fields and verification.
